text: - a. DOL debarment. Contractors and/or subcontractors that are found by the Secretary of Labor to be in aggravated or willful violation of the labor standards provisions of the Davis-Bacon and Related Acts (DBRA) will be ineligible (debarred) to participate in any DBRAor Davis-Bacon Act contracts for up to 3 years. Debarment includes the contractor or  subcontractor  and  any  firm,  corporation,  partnership  or  association  in  which  the contractor or subcontractor has a substantial interest. Debarment proceedings can be recommended by the contract administrator or can be initiated by the DOL.  Debarment proceedings are described in DOL regulations 29 CFR 5.12.
